title: Forge Optimized
description: Like simply optimized, but on Forge
body:
Pretty much every performance modpack is for fabric
But some pople still use Forge and high FPS can be obtained on Forge too

This is a very barebones modpack with no bloat. If you want to add some exta mods you can. Some optional mods that I reccomend are [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) 

I highly advise against using Forge on versions after 1.20 as mods are dropping support for it left and right. If you really want to use it though, install [Bedium](https://modrinth.com/mod/beddium)

Fullbright SP is included and enabled*
